sentences.arabic: كَانَ هُنَاكَ عَجُوزٌ حَكِيمٌ يَعِيشُ فِي قَرْيَةٍ صَغِيرَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Bio je jedan mudri starac koji je živio u malom selu.
sentences.translationEn: There was a wise old man living in a small village.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَحْكِي لِلْأَطْفَالِ قِصَصاً عَنِ الْأَمَانَةِ وَالصِّدْقِ كُلَّ مَسَاءٍ.
sentences.translation: Svake večeri je djeci pričao priče o poštenju i iskrenosti.
sentences.translationEn: He used to tell children stories about honesty and truthfulness every evening.

sentences.arabic: اِسْتَمَعَ الصِّغَارُ إِلَى حِكَايَاتِهِ بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Mališani su s velikim zanimanjem slušali njegove priče.
sentences.translationEn: The little ones listened to his tales with great interest.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمُوا مِنْهُ أَنَّ الْخَيْرَ يَنْتَصِرُ دَائِماً فِي النِّهَايَةِ.
sentences.translation: Od njega su naučili da dobro na kraju uvijek pobjeđuje.
sentences.translationEn: They learned from him that good always triumphs in the end.

sentences.arabic: أَحَبَّ الْجَمِيعُ هَذِهِ الْقِصَصَ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةَ الْبَسِيطَةَ.
sentences.translation: Svi su voljeli ove jednostavne tradicionalne priče.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone loved these simple traditional stories.
